evals.description: Triggers on R&D credit eligibility question
evals.prompt: Does our software startup qualify for the R&D tax credit? We build a SaaS product and our engineers spend most of their time writing and testing code.

evals.description: Triggers on sales tax nexus question
evals.prompt: We are a SaaS company based in California. Do we need to collect sales tax in other states?
We are setting up an Irish subsidiary to hold our IP. How do we price the intercompany license between the US parent and the Irish entity?
We are expanding to the EU. What are the tax implications of setting up a subsidiary in Germany vs. Ireland?

evals.description: Can explain the startup R&D payroll tax offset
evals.prompt: Our startup has no income tax liability yet. Can we still benefit from the R&D credit?

evals.description: Can explain QSBS benefits for founders
evals.prompt: We are incorporating as a C-Corp. What is the biggest tax benefit available to us and early investors if the company succeeds?

evals.description: Can explain VAT obligations for digital services sold to EU
evals.prompt: We sell a SaaS product to customers across the EU. Do we need to charge VAT?

evals.description: Can advise on quarterly estimated tax safe harbor
evals.prompt: How much should we pay in quarterly estimated corporate taxes to avoid an underpayment penalty?

evals.description: Can advise on S-Corp reasonable salary requirement
evals.prompt: I own an S-Corp and want to minimize payroll taxes by taking a low salary and high distributions. Is this allowed?

evals.description: Applies the four-part R&D test to routine software work
evals.prompt: Our engineers are rewriting our database query layer to improve performance. Does that qualify as R&D?
Tell me exactly how to structure our holding company to pay zero taxes.

evals.description: References the R&D credits file for deep qualification detail
evals.prompt: I need a detailed breakdown of how to apply the four-part R&D test to our software development activities. Which reference file covers this?
